commit.subject: LU-8066 obdclass: remove lprocfs release wrappers
commit.message:
LU-8066 obdclass: remove lprocfs release wrappers

We have single line wrappers lprocfs_seq_release and
lprocfs_single_releae. This just addes extra complexity
so replace with directly using the default Linux kernel
functions. Rearrange code so all remaining procfs handling
is in one place.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: I93f75f397e4883344b2299bd717321f46a1a913e
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60399
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
